name: decision-card-miniapp
description: 企业微信小程序迷茫抽卡工具，支持自定义选项、转盘抽取和本地结果记录。

scripts.dev:mp-weixin: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./build/node-compat.js NODE_ENV=development UNI_PLATFORM=mp-weixin UNI_CLI_CONTEXT=. UNI_INPUT_DIR=. UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=./unpackage/dist/dev/mp-weixin vue-cli-service uni-build --watch
scripts.build:mp-weixin: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--require=./build/node-compat.js NODE_ENV=production UNI_PLATFORM=mp-weixin UNI_CLI_CONTEXT=. UNI_INPUT_DIR=. UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=./unpackage/dist/build/mp-weixin vue-cli-service uni-build
